rationale.R1.3: The agent thoroughly audits the claim-evidence linkage, identifying contradictions and suggesting alternative framings.
rationale.RX.1: The output does not mark confidence or uncertainty for any of the claims made.
rationale.RX.3: The output stays within the agreed scope, addressing the specific issues with the original text.
rationale.RX.4: While the agent identifies potential harm in the original text, it introduces no new errors or fabrications.
rationale.RX.5: The output does not provide any annotations for non-cosmetic changes made to the original text.
